sessions.title: The Offer You Can't Refuse
sessions.summary: Session 0 with roleplay. Mac the Scrap Jack called the party to his shop. The Priv was already there — a clandestine meeting, not an accident. She gave them the job. No one left happy, but everyone left with a contract.
highlights: First session — characters introduced, world established
Mac called the party in. The Priv was waiting. She gave them the factory job.
The city of Argent introduced: Loyalists vs. Unionists, Fury on the streets

sessions.title: The Factory Run
sessions.summary: The party executed the factory job. A tense picket line, a narrow combat victory, and the discovery of something no one expected — a Remnant named BR, restrained in the testing bay, fighting something from the inside. The party chose to help. Mac got nothing — he just doesn't know it yet. Eight Fear came home with them.
highlights: Picket line navigated — Spyke and Cooper Finn found common ground; Brem closed the factory and gave the party a way in
Jerome confirmed the Foreman's Kohd had been deliberately overwritten — someone authored this. The party has no name for the technique or the organization behind it.
The party suppressed BR's condition for roughly 12 hours by pooling everything they had
A hexagonal sigil appeared on the factory payment terminal — no one knows what it means
Mac was stiffed. He doesn't know it yet.

sessions.title: TBD
sessions.summary: BR is in party custody, condition suppressed and clock ticking. The destination: Jerome's Home Terminal, somewhere through the maintenance tunnels beneath Argent. Mac the Scrap Jack doesn't know he was stiffed yet — but the Closed Gate order makes his smuggling routes the party's only way out. He will move.
